Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. TurboQuant: Redefining AI efficiency with extreme compression 34 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Algorithm Visualizer 62 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. A Compiler Writing Journey 59 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. Intel Device Modeling Language for virtual platforms 20 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Show HN: DuckDB community extension for prefiltered HNSW using ACORN-1 28 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Show HN: I took back Video.js after 16 years and we rewrote it to be 88% smaller 316 upvotes, 57 comments
  7. Show HN: Email.md – Markdown to responsive, email-safe HTML 257 upvotes, 60 comments
  8. Implementing automatic eSIM installation on Android 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Show HN: Gemini can now natively embed video, so I built sub-second video search 295 upvotes, 83 comments
  10. Wine 11 rewrites how Linux runs Windows games at kernel with massive speed gains 812 upvotes, 276 comments
  11. Flighty Airports 236 upvotes, 78 comments
  12. An Aural Companion for Decades, CBS News Radio Crackles to a Close 47 upvotes, 11 comments
  13. Hypothesis, Antithesis, synthesis 235 upvotes, 82 comments
  14. How the world’s first electric grid was built 74 upvotes, 21 comments
  15. Hypura – A storage-tier-aware LLM inference scheduler for Apple Silicon 196 upvotes, 75 comments
  16. Meta ordered to pay $375M in New Mexico trial over child exploitation 56 upvotes, 17 comments
  17. Why did the chicken cross the road? 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. I wanted to build vertical SaaS for pest control, so I took a technician job 255 upvotes, 113 comments
  19. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 67 upvotes, 25 comments
  20. Fun with CSF firmware (RK3588 GPU firmware) 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  21. Apple Business 581 upvotes, 342 comments
  22. You can run a DNS server (2025) 37 upvotes, 14 comments
  23. What happened to GEM? 63 upvotes, 29 comments
  24. Tell HN: Litellm 1.82.7 and 1.82.8 on PyPI are compromised 593 upvotes, 404 comments
  25. Goodbye to Sora 591 upvotes, 429 comments
  26. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 34 upvotes, 16 comments
  27. Arm AGI CPU 313 upvotes, 242 comments
  28. The final switch: Goldsboro, 1961 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Missile defense is NP-complete 300 upvotes, 310 comments
  30. Social media bans and digital curfews to be trialled on UK teenagers 10 upvotes, 12 comments

Last generated 2:30pm, 25 March 2026. Source here.
